title: just some songs?
summary: No. They mean the very essence of life to me. Those songs are what means to be alive in their own way. A girl brings out a rocky rock version of a beautiful rendition of late 17th century. Ani choying shows us the perspective of each environment. "Phool ko ankha ma phool nei sansara, Kada ko ankha ma kada sansara." A soul brought up in a harsh environment should be shown that the world is not full of thrones, there can be a path where flowers bloom.
